sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60526" key="kubisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠβιστ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60526.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Κυβιστητής</ref> </xr> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tumbler</tr_>), dub. in M.Bulard <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">La relig. domestique dans la colonie ital. de Délos</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg034:482" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">482</biblScope> </bibl> (vase).</sense> </entryFree>
